recent_events.task: Upgrade QISSA HE Meta reel from proof-safe to ad-grade v2

Built v2: added sticky CTA primitive, heat-flash transition primitive, ad_contract validation requiring sticky CTA + transitions, stronger TAP GET DIRECTIONS copy, and rendered locally + RTX/NVENC.
